inputs.label: Power Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average power draw of the equipment or facility in kilowatts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average power draw of the equipment or facility in kilowatts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmanın veya tesisin kilovat cinsinden ortalama güç tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Leistungsaufnahme der Anlage in Kilowatt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance moyenne consommée par l'équipement ou l'installation en kilowatts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia media del equipo o instalación en kilovatios.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours the equipment operates each day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hours the equipment operates each day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmanın her gün çalıştığı saat sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'heures de fonctionnement de l'équipement par jour.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas que el equipo opera cada día.

inputs.label: Operating Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Typical number of operating days in a month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical number of operating days in a month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir aydaki tipik çalışma günü sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Anzahl der Betriebstage in einem Monat.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre typique de jours de fonctionnement dans un mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número típico de días operativos en un mes.

inputs.label: Electricity Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour of energy consumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilowatt-hour of energy consumed.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por kilovatio-hora de energía consumida.

inputs.label: Peak Demand
inputs.businessContext: Highest average demand in kW during a 15-minute interval in the billing period. Set to 0 if no demand charge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Highest average demand in kW during a 15-minute interval in the billing period. Set to 0 if no demand charge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura döneminde 15 dakikalık bir aralıkta kW cinsinden en yüksek ortalama talep. Talep ücreti yoksa 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höchste durchschnittliche Last in kW während eines 15-Minuten-Intervalls im Abrechnungszeitraum. Auf 0 setzen, wenn keine Leistungspreiskomponente.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande moyenne la plus élevée en kW sur un intervalle de 15 minutes au cours de la période de facturation. Mettre à 0 s'il n'y a pas de charge de demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Demanda promedio más alta en kW durante un intervalo de 15 minutos en el período de facturación. Establecer en 0 si no hay cargo por demanda.

inputs.label: Demand Charge Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kW of peak demand. Set to 0 if no demand charge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kW of peak demand. Set to 0 if no demand charge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pik talep başına kW maliyeti. Talep ücreti yoksa 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro kW Spitzenlast. Auf 0 setzen, wenn keine Leistungspreiskomponente.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par kW de pic de demande. Mettre à 0 s'il n'y a pas de charge de demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por kW de demanda máxima. Establecer en 0 si no hay cargo por demanda.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
